HGSS.680.0001:
When I’m reading textbooks and walking,
I have to look down, so I notice items\r
on the ground.\f
Next time I find something, I’ll give it
to you.\f
May I have your phone number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.680.0002:
I’ll call you as soon as I find
something. You can count on it!
HGSS.680.0003:
Oh... I thought it would be a good
break to call you when I’m studying...
HGSS.680.0004:
If I find something, it’s yours.
So may I have your phone number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.680.0005: This, this! This is yours! Ta-da!\f
HGSS.680.0006:
Huh?
Wait. Don’t tell me you’re nearby?\f
Did you not notice because you were
too busy looking at the ground, too?
HGSS.680.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s getting stronger,
exactly as I calculated!\f
By the way, we knocked out a wild
[0100,000B,0000] just the other day.\f
Studying up in advance worked!\f
See you later!
HGSS.680.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s getting stronger,
exactly as I calculated!\f
By the way, a wild [0100,000B,0000] escaped
on me yesterday.\f
A computational error on my part...\f
See you later!
HGSS.680.0009:
I’ve studied quite a bit since then, and
I’ve gotten a lot better!\f
I’m hanging out on [0104,0003,0000].
Can you come down for a battle?
HGSS.680.0010:
If we don’t battle soon, I’ll forget my
strategy!\f
I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.680.0011:
I haven’t picked up anything yet.
I’ll call you if I find something.
HGSS.680.0012:
Heh heh. I found something really
awesome earlier!\f
I’ll give it to you. Can you come to
[0104,0003,0000] and pick it up?
HGSS.680.0013:
I have to do my homework, so can you
come get your gift right away?\f
I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
